final:
module mux_8to1(
    input [2:0] sel,
    input [7:0] in,
    output out);

    assign out = (sel == 3'b000) ? in[0] :
                 (sel == 3'b001) ? in[1] :
                 (sel == 3'b010) ? in[2] :
                 (sel == 3'b011) ? in[3] :
                 (sel == 3'b100) ? in[4] :
                 (sel == 3'b101) ? in[5] :
                 (sel == 3'b110) ? in[6] :
                                   in[7];
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= in[0];
    end
  end

endmodule
